= Character Replacement Plus

Plus at end of line: text {plus}
next line

Asterisk around text: {asterisk}text{asterisk}

Backtick around text: {backtick}code{backtick}

C++ keyword: {cpp}

Vertical bar: {vbar}

Double plus: {pp}

Caret: {caret}

Tilde: {tilde}

Brackets: {startsb}content{endsb}

Backslash: {backslash}

Two colons: {two-colons}

Two semicolons: {two-semicolons}

Apos: {apos}

Quot: {quot}
